discovered_clues: Hot stew and rumors for coin.

recent_player_actions.text: Galinor strides up to the runner. "You there, runner. I'm a hero looking for a way to aid this city, what issues could use my assistance?"
Galinor hands over the silver. "Tell me! Who would attack honest watchmen?"
"The Ash Cowl? How can I stay clear of them while investigating this?"
"Fair enough. Where was that patrol last seen?"

frontier_gate.last_player_action_text: "Fair enough. Where was that patrol last seen?"

recent_contextual_leads.subject: tavern runner shifts nervously, glancing around as they reply, "staying clear of the ash cowl means being cautious and avoiding patrols
"they were last reported
recent_contextual_leads.position: near the old milestone," the tavern runner replies, glancing nervously around the square

topic:assistance_city_galinor.last_answer: The Tavern Runner leans in closer, their voice low. "Rumors say there’s trouble brewing near the old milestone—something about a missing patrol that might’ve stumbled into a dark secret. If you’re willing to buy me a drink, I might share more about what I know. For five silver, I can tell you about the last spot they were seen." They glance around, ensuring no one is eavesdropping too closely.
topic:assistance_city_galinor.last_player_input: Galinor strides up to the runner. "You there, runner. I'm a hero looking for a way to aid this city, what issues could use my assistance?"

topic:attack_galinor_hand.last_answer: "They were last reported near the old milestone," the Tavern Runner replies, glancing nervously around the square. "It's said they stumbled into something they shouldn't have, so tread lightly if you go looking for them. But if you want more details, I'd suggest talking to Lord Aldric—he might know more than he lets on."
topic:attack_galinor_hand.last_player_input: "Fair enough. Where was that patrol last seen?"
